item.title: Country lick inspired by the goat @brentmason.officialрҹҗҗ TAB a...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Country lick inspired by the goat @brentmason.officialрҹҗҗ TAB and lesson for this lick is available on my вһЎпёҸ PatreonрҹӨ рҹҡӮ $5/month to get access to all of my lessons, solos, etudes, licks, backing tracks and much more! (LINK IN BIO)вҖўвҖўвҖў#guitar #guitarist #telecaster #guitarsolo #guitarlicks#doublestops #country #countryguitar #chickenpicking
